V1.description:
The inaugural and hopefully only release of BKBK but it's furnace fun. Happy Day of the Fool from Australia! (The future is not as great as it's made out to be).

Massive thanks to my Recomp Rando Buddy Hyped for the polish on the warping functions. 

Here is a little something I cooked up over the weekend for this fun little day. Now to go hand in hand with Master Quest only Water Temple runs is BKBK But it's only Furnace Fun. 

So what's in the release?

#Every single tile is a check. All 77 pictured ones. 
#The board is broken into 10 distinct parts and you need board access items to unlock more squares. (You didn't think I would let you have  a free game completion right? )
#Brentilda hints are items in bundles of 10 scattered across the multi world.  

# Special note. Github forces the file to use . instead of ' so you will need to rename it after download to BKBK_But_It's_Only_Furnace_Fun.apworld
V1.title: BKBK But It's Only Furnace Fun V1
